name: Paw Palace Retreat
about: Paw Palace Retreat is your pet's second home. We provide a luxurious and loving environment tailored for both cats and dogs. With our experienced staff and clean, cozy space, your furry friend will feel safe and pampered while you're away.
experience: 7 years of experience in pet hosting & care

reviews.author: Laila & Karim
reviews.comment: Absolutely amazing service! My cat Luna didn’t want to leave. The staff treated her like royalty.

reviews.author: Mohamed Saber
reviews.comment: Very clean, well-maintained place. The team was responsive and friendly. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Dina Hossam
reviews.comment: Good overall, though I wish they had longer daily playtimes. But my puppy was safe and happy.

reviews.author: John & Sarah
reviews.comment: Our dogs Max and Bella had the best time ever! We loved the daily photo updates. Thank you!

reviews.author: Nourhan Ali
reviews.comment: Beautiful environment and professional handlers. Booking was super easy too.

reviews.author: Ahmed El-Sayed
reviews.comment: Top-notch care and very affordable. They even celebrated my dog’s birthday with a mini party!
